ui:enum-descriptions.INLINE: Inline element — content flows within surrounding text (e.g. <b>, <span>, <a>)

useOkapiSegmentation.title: Use Okapi segmentation for output
useOkapiSegmentation.description:
If disabled, all XINI segments with the same value
of the attribute 'SegmentIDBeforeSegmentation' will be merged.
If the XINI was not segmented, it will remain unsegmented.
If this option is enabled, new segmentation
(i.e. from segmentation step) will be used for the output.

attributes.title: Attribute Rules
attributes.description: Global attribute extraction rules — maps attribute names to their rule configuration

elementRule.description: Extraction rule for an HTML/XML element

ruleTypes.title: Rule Types
ruleTypes.description: Extraction rule types for this element

ui:enum-descriptions.INLINE: Inline element — content flows within surrounding text (e.g. <b>, <span>, <a>)
ui:enum-descriptions.INLINE_EXCLUDED: Inline element excluded by a conditional rule
ui:enum-descriptions.INLINE_INCLUDED: Inline element included by a conditional rule (exception to EXCLUDE)
ui:enum-descriptions.TEXTUNIT: Text unit — extracted as a translatable segment with skeleton before/after
ui:enum-descriptions.EXCLUDE: Excluded — element and all children are skipped during extraction
ui:enum-descriptions.INCLUDE: Included — exception to an EXCLUDE rule, re-enables extraction inside excluded block
ui:enum-descriptions.ATTRIBUTES_ONLY: Only attributes are translatable/localizable, not the element's text content
ui:enum-descriptions.SERVER: Server element — embedded server-side content (e.g. JSP, PHP, Mason tags)

elementType.title: Element Type
elementType.description: Semantic type hint for UI display (e.g. bold, italic, link, image, paragraph, underlined)

translatableAttributes.title: Translatable Attributes
translatableAttributes.description: Attributes to extract as translatable content (e.g. alt, title, placeholder)

writableLocalizableAttributes.title: Writable Localizable Attributes
writableLocalizableAttributes.description: Attributes to extract as writable localizable content (e.g. href, src — locale-specific, editable)

readOnlyLocalizableAttributes.title: Read-Only Localizable Attributes
readOnlyLocalizableAttributes.description: Attributes to extract as read-only localizable content (locale-specific but not user-editable)

idAttributes.title: ID Attributes
idAttributes.description: Attributes that contain segment IDs (sets the TextUnit name)

attributeRule.description: Global extraction rule for an HTML/XML attribute

ui:enum-descriptions.ATTRIBUTE_TRANS: Translatable — attribute content is extracted for translation
ui:enum-descriptions.ATTRIBUTE_WRITABLE: Writable localizable — attribute is locale-specific and editable (e.g. URLs, paths)
ui:enum-descriptions.ATTRIBUTE_READONLY: Read-only localizable — attribute is locale-specific but not user-editable
ui:enum-descriptions.ATTRIBUTE_ID: ID — attribute value is used as the segment identifier
ui:enum-descriptions.ATTRIBUTE_PRESERVE_WHITESPACE: Preserve whitespace — attribute controls whitespace preservation state

allElementsExcept.title: All Elements Except
allElementsExcept.description: Apply this rule to all elements except the listed ones

onlyTheseElements.title: Only These Elements
onlyTheseElements.description: Apply this rule only to the listed elements

preserve.title: Preserve Whitespace Condition
preserve.description: Condition that activates whitespace preservation (e.g. [xml:space, EQUALS, preserve])

default.title: Default Whitespace Condition
default.description: Condition that restores default whitespace handling (e.g. [xml:space, EQUALS, default])

ui:enum-descriptions.MATCHES: Java regex match (must match entire attribute value)

prefixItems.description: Value to compare — a single string or array of strings (OR logic for EQUALS/MATCHES, AND logic for NOT_EQUALS)

conditionalAttributeValue.description: Conditional attribute extraction — null (unconditional) or condition tuple(s)

oneOf.description: Multiple conditions (OR logic — extract if any condition matches)
